notes: Austgen 1991 verifies the unsymmetric standard-state convention and mole-fraction activity expression for the H3O+ water-autoprotolysis basis; use is blocked only by upstream activity-coupled solver support.
Austgen 1991 verifies the CO2 + 2H2O -> HCO3- + H3O+ constant on the unsymmetric mole-fraction activity basis; use is blocked only by upstream activity-coupled solver support.
Austgen 1991 verifies the HCO3- + H2O -> CO3^2- + H3O+ constant on the unsymmetric mole-fraction activity basis; carbonate activity behavior remains a Phase 2/3 sensitivity risk.

Austgen 1991 verifies MEA carbamate reversion to bicarbonate as reaction 7a with a fitted VLE-data constant on the same unsymmetric mole-fraction activity basis; no Tong molality conversion is used in Phase 2.

Austgen 1991 verifies protonated MEA dissociation as reaction 6a and states the constant is corrected to the pure amine reference state; use is blocked only by upstream activity-coupled solver support.
